title: ctenopteris schwackei
intro: Ctenopteris schwackei, also known as the South American fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. The leaves of this plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues. Research suggests that Ctenopteris schwackei has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, pain, and respiratory infections, and provide overall health benefits. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried or crushed to be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams to utilize its medicinal properties.
